channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Jobs & Internships
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe vacancies plus the three rolling Mutapa Times internships (Social, Editor, Data). Each item ships with a branded card image for the social autolist.

item.title: Social Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake.
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Editor Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake.
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Data Intern — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake.
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Mazowe Rural District Council — GIS Technician
item.description: INCUMBENT: GIS TECHNICIAN GRADE : GRADE8 REPORTS TO : DISTRICT PLANNER Mazowe · Full Time (via vacancymail.co.zw)
item.dc:creator: Mazowe Rural District Council
